content:
Character: Aaron Whitfield
Perception: Aaron's the writer on four — angular face, intense eyes, always typing or scribbling. He seems smart, serious, the kind of guy who'd be interesting over a beer but hard to get there. We've had a few brief hallway exchanges — mostly him asking about cooking for some article angle. I think he sees me as Mike's quiet roommate. I know he writes for magazines, that he's working on a book. He borrowed my Allen wrench once and returned it the next morning with a thank-you note. That's a man who was raised right.
summary:
Character: Aaron Whitfield
Perception: Aaron's the writer on four — angular face, intense eyes, always typing or scribbling. He seems smart, serious, the kind of guy who'd be interesting over a beer but hard to get there. We've had a few brief hallway exchanges — mostly him asking about cooking for some article angle. I think he sees me as Mike's quiet roommate. I know he writes for magazines, that he's working on a book. He borrowed my Allen wrench once and returned it the next morning with a thank-you note. That's a man who was raised right.
